sideboard.description: Low wide storage unit, typically for dining rooms or living rooms

width_cm.description: Full external width; sideboards are characteristically wider than they are tall

height_cm.description: Floor to top surface; includes plinth if present

display_cabinet.description: Tall cabinet with glazed upper section for displaying objects

width_cm.description: Full external width; typically narrower than sideboards

depth_cm.description: Front-to-back external depth; shallower than storage cabinets

height_cm.description: Floor to top; tall format is the defining characteristic

storage_cabinet.description: General-purpose enclosed storage unit with 1-2 doors

width_cm.description: Full external width; compact to mid-size

depth_cm.description: Front-to-back external depth; deeper than display cabinets

plinth_height_cm.description: Height of the recessed toe-kick plinth base; included within height_cm

door_count.description: Number of door leaves on the front face; 0 = open shelving

sanity_checks.message: Cabinet height exceeds realistic maximum of 250 cm — check if dimensions were swapped

sanity_checks.rule: width_cm must be greater than depth_cm
sanity_checks.message: Cabinet depth exceeds width — verify orientation; cabinets are normally wider than they are deep

sanity_checks.rule: sideboard height must be less than width
sanity_checks.message: Sideboard height is greater than width — sideboards are always wider than tall; dimensions may be swapped

sanity_checks.rule: display cabinet height must be greater than 1.5x width
sanity_checks.message: Display cabinet does not appear tall enough relative to width — verify sub-type classification
